3011260.name: beyond.frontiers
3011260.description:
Trade. Discover. Conquer.


Embark on a journey through the boundless depths of space in beyond.frontiers, an immersive open-world space adventure where your choices shape the fate of the galaxy. As a daring explorer, you'll traverse the uncharted regions of the frontier, balancing alliances, uncovering long-buried secrets, and carving out your own destiny across three rival empires — while whispers of a mysterious new faction loom on the horizon.

A Living Universe, Yours to Shape


Venture into over 100 handcrafted star systems filled with hidden wormholes, forgotten ruins, and dynamic events. Every decision influences the universe around you — from the balance of power between factions to the shifting supply and demand of the completely dynamic economy.

The frontier is alive — factions expand, conflicts ignite, and new opportunities arise as the story unfolds. Whether you're a trader seeking fortune, a mercenary hired for perilous missions, or an explorer chasing ancient secrets, the galaxy adapts to your journey.

Three Dominant Factions — Infinite Possibilities


Align yourself with one of three distinct empires, each with its own vision for the frontier:

- The Terran Conglomerate: Profit is power. As the hypercapitalistic rulers of the largest empire, the Conglomerate rewards those who thrive in trade and wealth accumulation — but their loyalty follows credits, not morals.
- Sirius Dominion: Freedom above all. The Sirians foster democracy and camaraderie, yet their borders are under constant threat from pirates and forgotten routes. Stand with those who value loyalty, even at the edge of chaos.
- Orionic Council: Knowledge is strength. Once a lost Terran colony, the Orionics rebuilt their society on progress and meritocracy. Prove your intellect and rise through their ranks to unlock experimental technologies and shape the future.

But not all powers in the galaxy have revealed themselves — ancient stories speak of those who watched from the shadows, waiting for their time to return.

Pilot the Ship of Your Dreams


Choose from over 30 meticulously crafted ships — from nimble explorers to massive capital vessels. Customize your ship with weapons, defensive systems, cargo holds, and advanced tech.
Speed through asteroid fields in the versatile Starlight, command the resourceful Demeter freighter across trade routes, engage in fleet battles aboard a fully armed Condor weapons platform or toy around in a Boilt-Class racing ship. Salvage wreckage, mine rare materials, conquer sectors, trade yourself to a millionaire or find cosmic anomalies — the choice is yours.

Immersive Storylines — Fully Voiced


With over 20 hours of fully voiced narrative content, beyond.frontiers invites you into a universe rich with stories, both grand and intimate.

Walk in the footsteps of the legendary James P. Burnard (voiced by Twitch streamer Pelikano), the immortal Wanderer seeking redemption across the stars. Aid forbidden lovers torn between warring factions. Discover ancient stellar remnants lost to time. Lead your chosen empire to expansion — or sabotage its ambitions from within. Uncover clues of a hidden power waiting to reshape the frontier.

Every station offers procedurally generated missions — from bounty hunts to defense contracts — alongside whispers of hidden events and rumors that may unveil entire new storylines.

A Moddable Universe Without Limits


From new ships to entirely custom sectors, beyond.frontiers is built with moddability in mind. Expand the universe with community creations or craft your own vision — every part of the game is open to your imagination.

Key Features:


  • Open-world galaxy with over 100 systems and hidden sectors
  • Three major factions with unique philosophies and storylines
  • Over 30 pilotable ships ranging from fighters to battleships
  • Dynamic economy driven by supply, demand, and player actions
  • Station building and trading systems
  • Multiverse Chat & Community Events
  • Over 20 hours of fully voice-acted story campaigns
  • Procedurally generated missions and hidden rumors
  • Full modding support with a built-in modding API
  • A vibrant universe filled with secrets, easter eggs, and lore waiting to be discovered

Your Frontier Awaits


Explore forgotten systems, outsmart your enemies, and leave your mark on the edge of known space. Whether you're chasing fortune, power, or truth — the frontiers are calling.

Are you ready to go beyond?
